title: Senior Software Engineer
content:
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our platform team.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement scalable microservices
- Lead technical discussions and code reviews
- Mentor junior engineers
- Contribute to architecture decisions

Requirements:
- 5+ years of software development experience
- Strong understanding of distributed systems
- Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
- Proficiency in Python, Java, or Go

Benefits:
- Competitive salary ($150-180K)
- Remote work flexibility
- Health insurance
- Stock options
- Professional development budget

title: Data Scientist
content:
Join our Data Science team to build cutting-edge ML models.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and train machine learning models
- Analyze large datasets using statistical methods
- Create data visualizations and dashboards
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams

Requirements:
- MS in Computer Science, Statistics, or related field
- 3+ years of data science experience
- Proficiency in Python and SQL
- Experience with TensorFlow or PyTorch

Nice to have:
- Experience with big data technologies (Spark, Hadoop)
- Published research or Kaggle competition experience

Compensation:
- $120-150K salary
- Comprehensive health benefits
- 401(k) matching
- Flexible work hours

title: Product Manager
content:
We seek an experienced Product Manager to lead our next generation platform.

Responsibilities:
- Define product strategy and roadmap
- Conduct user research and competitive analysis
- Work with design and engineering to build features
- Track KPIs and measure product success

Requirements:
- 5+ years of product management experience
- Proven track record of launching successful products
- Strong analytical and communication skills
- MBA or equivalent business experience

What we offer:
- Competitive salary ($140-170K)
- Equity
- Flexible work arrangement
- Learning and development opportunities
- Collaborative team environment
